examples: There was a stack of a hundred and forty-nine Bollywood posters that he had bought in Mumbai, and a Christian Louboutin Cat Burglar Barbie, wearing a black latex catsuit and many-buckled sandals.
The dresses range from a sleeveless stage gown encrusted with crystals that dates back to 1955 to a chiffon catsuit she wore at her 60th birthday concert at Althorp Park in 1997.
